steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify task has no unmet dependencies (task.json declares no dependencies).

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Initialize mandatory task folder structure including assets/library/.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Review t0002's Yao2022 ReAct summary plus related corpus entries to ground the prompt format and library API.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: t0002 already covered the relevant literature; this is a deterministic library task with no need for fresh internet search.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Survey existing project libraries and prior code to avoid duplicating ReAct primitives or trajectory-logging utilities.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Write plan/plan.md describing the ScopeAwareReactAgent API, trajectory-log schema, file layout, and test plan.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: deterministic library task, no remote compute needed.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Implement scope_aware_react.py library, deterministic-mode tests, and the assets/library/scope_aware_react_v1/ asset.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: deterministic write-library task; alternatives belong in suggestions.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json (empty for library task), costs.json (zero), and any auxiliary result files describing the API surface and test summary.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: library task produces no quantitative metrics comparable to published results.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up suggestions including benchmark-specific tool registries and Phase 2 experiment integration.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, mark task complete.
